entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00124) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MAKE ADMINISTRATIVE UPDATES TO THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) CLAUSES, AND ATTACHMENTS AND EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF THE FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI PROGRAM.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00125) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE OPTION SUB-CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (SLINS) 1734AD AND 1834AC FOR THE LOT YEAR XVIII AND XIX PORTIONS OF THE UH-72A GTX-330 TRANSPONDER UPGRADE EFFORT.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00132) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE CONTRACTOR NAME FROM CSRA TO GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY(GDIT)ON THE FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI CONTRACT, IN ACCORDANCE WITH A DEFENSE CONTRACT MANAGEMENT AGENCY NOVATION AGREEMENT.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00133) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EO14042 ADD DEFENSE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION SUPPLEMENT 252.223- 7999 ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID-19 SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS(DEVIATION 2021-O0009)TO FLIGHT SCHOOL XXI CONTRACT.
